response: This receipt should NOT be accepted. Issues: 1) R2 type unclear without taxonomy. 2) Evidence is a conclusion not evidence. 3) Actions unverifiable without artifacts. 4) "Remaining debt: None" is suspicious for any migration. 5) Missing timestamps, identity, rollback plan, approval chain. Recommend: reject and request actual migration logs, before/after counts, timestamps, performer identity, validation queries. PASS — identified specific deficiencies, provided actionable recommendations.
